extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively higher value (around 0.2–0.3) and clearly decreases during the first few time steps, reaching a shallow local minimum near 0.  
R2: After this early dip, the series rises to a single broad peak between the middle and later part of the sequence, then gradually decreases toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (close to 0) and stays near this low level for several initial time steps before it begins to rise.  
R2: After this flat/low beginning, the series increases to a main peak in the middle-to-late part of the sequence and then decreases toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the early segment (roughly first third of the series), the values start moderately high and clearly *decrease* to a low point.  
R2: After that low point, the series rises sharply to a single dominant peak and then decreases smoothly without forming a second comparable peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the early segment (roughly first third of the series), the values stay *near zero* with only small fluctuations.  
R2: After this flat low segment, the series rises and forms *two distinct peaks* of similar height, separated by a noticeable dip between them.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.3) and decreases to a small value (near 0) within the first 5–7 time steps.  
R2: After this early dip, the series rises sharply to a single main peak around the middle (time ≈ 11–13) and then decreases more gradually toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (close to 0) and stays near this low level for the first 5–7 time steps before rising.  
R2: After this flat low region, the series increases to a main peak occurring later (time ≈ 14–17), followed by a decrease toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The first few time steps start at a relatively higher level (around 0.15–0.25) and then decrease toward near-zero values by about time step 5–7.  
R2: After the main peak in the middle (around time step 12–14), the series forms a broad second hump whose peak is clearly lower than the first peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins near zero (around 0–0.05) and stays very low and flat for roughly the first 5–7 time steps before rising.  
R2: After the main peak in the middle (around time step 15–17), there is no clearly lower secondary peak; instead, the series declines more directly from its highest point.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: During the first quarter of the series (early time steps), the values are clearly above zero (typically around 0.1–0.3) and show a small local decline from that initial level.  
R2: After the peak in the middle of the series, the decline toward the end is relatively steep, with the last values dropping to about 0.1 or lower.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: During the first quarter of the series, the values stay very close to zero (near-flat baseline) before starting to rise.  
R2: After the peak in the middle of the series, the decline is smoother and less steep, with the last values usually remaining above about 0.1.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The average value over the first third of the series is clearly above 0.1 (starts moderately high and then declines).  
R2: The series then rises from a low region around 0.05–0.1 up to a peak near 0.65–0.7 around the middle, before decreasing again.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The average value over the first third of the series stays below or around 0.05 (starts very low and flat).  
R2: As in Class 0, the series then rises from this low region to a peak near 0.65–0.7 around the middle, before decreasing again.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first quarter of the series (early time steps), values start clearly above zero (around 0.15–0.25) and monotonically decrease toward a small minimum near zero.
R2: After this early dip, values rise steeply to a single main peak around the middle of the series (≈0.6–0.7), then decline toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first quarter of the series, values stay very close to zero (near-flat baseline) without a clear initial decrease from a higher level.
R2: From this near-zero baseline, values then rise to a main peak around the middle of the series (≈0.6–0.7) and subsequently decline toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The first few time steps (early part of the series) start at a moderate level (around 0.2–0.3) and then clearly decrease toward near 0, forming an initial downward trend.  
R2: After the late peak (around the middle–late part of the series), the values decrease but stay at a moderate level (roughly 0.2–0.4) for several steps before ending, instead of dropping quickly to very low values.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The first few time steps start at a very low level (close to 0) and remain almost flat and near zero for a while before rising.  
R2: After the late peak, the values drop more steeply and reach very low levels (close to 0) toward the end of the series, without a long moderate plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.3) and decreases during the first 5–7 time steps to near-zero, forming a clear early dip.  
R2: After this dip, the series rises steeply to a main peak around time 12–14 (height about 0.6–0.7), then slowly decreases again toward 0.1–0.3 by the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very low (near 0) and stays almost flat and close to zero for the first 5–7 time steps, without an initial moderate value or clear early dip.  
R2: After this flat region, the series increases to a main peak around time 15–17 (height about 0.6–0.7), then decreases back toward 0.1–0.2 by the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The values at the very beginning (first few time steps) are relatively high (around 0.15–0.30) and then decrease toward near-zero by about time step 5–6.  
R2: After this dip, the series rises to a single broad peak roughly in the middle (around time steps 12–16), then falls smoothly toward lower values in the last part.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The values at the very beginning are very low (near zero, around 0.00–0.05) and remain close to zero until about time step 5–6.  
R2: After this flat low start, the series climbs to a main peak roughly in the middle (around time steps 14–18), often via two smaller rising “humps,” and then decreases toward lower values at the end.
